title: Reduce banner image cropping
objective: Adjust the homepage banner so substantially more of the provided banner image is visible, avoiding the current aggressive crop while keeping the ATLAS text overlay readable.
instructions: Edit the banner presentation in assets/main.css and index.html only if HTML changes are truly needed.
Prefer a presentation that shows most or all of assets/atlas-banner.png rather than cropping it with cover behavior.
It is acceptable to make the banner taller or to use contained/letterboxed presentation if that preserves the image better.
Keep the ATLAS title and date text readable on top of the image and preserve responsive behavior.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit scope to the banner crop/presentation fix and minimum supporting changes only.
expected_outputs: Homepage banner shows substantially more of the full image with improved crop behavior.
definition_of_done: Banner no longer relies on the current aggressive crop behavior.
Overlay text remains readable across desktop and mobile widths.
ResultPacket lists changed artifacts and any doc implications.
